stages.desc: Former PTT. Currently operating with Chuck E Live Stage (Dance Floor) as of August 9, 2023. One of last two 2-Stage's operating in California. One of five animatronic stages to remain intact, those being the Nanuet, NY (250 West Route 59) Studio C Beta, Springfield, IL (2369 McArthur Ave) Concept Unification 1-Stage, Charlotte, NC (7701 Pineville-Matthews Rd) Concept Unification Stage, and Hicksville, NY (Delco Plaza 11-15 Hanover Place) 1-Stage.
